purpose: Paper58 Batch 5 mixed external Tier 1 full-gate candidates with targeted urban stress rows and non-Urban stratum support

areas.selection_reason: independent Baiyangdian-adjacent urban-edge candidate to probe class-11 urban-fringe transitions without reusing prior xiong'an rows
areas.contact_evidence: area name and bbox are absent from DEFAULT_TRAINING_AREAS, known development areas, and the Batch 1, Batch 2, Batch 3, and Batch 4 manifests
areas.notes: Batch 5 xiong_an_like urban-fringe candidate for lakeplain edge conversion and class-11 stress

areas.selection_reason: independent lowland new-town candidate to test whether the xiong'an-like class-11 bottleneck repeats outside the earlier river-corridor rows
areas.contact_evidence: area name and bbox are absent from DEFAULT_TRAINING_AREAS, known development areas, and the Batch 1, Batch 2, Batch 3, and Batch 4 manifests
areas.notes: Batch 5 xiong_an_like urban-fringe candidate for lakeplain redevelopment and wetland-edge pressure

areas.selection_reason: independent lower-Yangtze dense urban-edge candidate to test small-offset localization sensitivity without reusing Suzhou, Kunshan, Jiaxing, or Taihu rows
areas.contact_evidence: area name and bbox are absent from DEFAULT_TRAINING_AREAS, known development areas, and the Batch 1, Batch 2, Batch 3, and Batch 4 manifests
areas.notes: Batch 5 suzhou_like dense-edge localization candidate for lower-Yangtze spatial robustness

areas.selection_reason: independent delta wetland-margin candidate to restore non-Urban full-gate support and test coastal marsh transitions outside prior lake-margin rows
areas.contact_evidence: area name and bbox are absent from DEFAULT_TRAINING_AREAS, known development areas, and the Batch 1, Batch 2, Batch 3, and Batch 4 manifests
areas.notes: Batch 5 wetland candidate for mixed-gate non-Urban support

areas.selection_reason: independent irrigated plain candidate to add agricultural support outside Tarim, Sanjiang, Songnen, Hexi, and Weihe rows
areas.contact_evidence: area name and bbox are absent from DEFAULT_TRAINING_AREAS, known development areas, and the Batch 1, Batch 2, Batch 3, and Batch 4 manifests
areas.notes: Batch 5 agriculture candidate for mixed-gate non-Urban support

areas.selection_reason: independent forest-edge candidate to provide a third non-Urban landscape type outside Wuyi, Xiaoxinganling, Qinling, Changbai, and Nanling rows
areas.contact_evidence: area name and bbox are absent from DEFAULT_TRAINING_AREAS, known development areas, and the Batch 1, Batch 2, Batch 3, and Batch 4 manifests
areas.notes: Batch 5 forest candidate for third-stratum mixed-gate support

areas.selection_reason: independent northern grassland-margin candidate to reduce dependence on any single non-Urban stratum and avoid reusing Ordos or Hulun rows
areas.contact_evidence: area name and bbox are absent from DEFAULT_TRAINING_AREAS, known development areas, and the Batch 1, Batch 2, Batch 3, and Batch 4 manifests
